title: Egg Hunter Enchantment
description: This adds a new enchantment called egg hunter to the game. Egg hunter has 7 levels, and gives you a 1% chance to get a mob's spawn egg when you kill it, per level. This mod is compatible with all mods I have tested so far. Have fun!!!
body: This mod add a new enchantment, called egg hunter to the game. Egg hunter has up to 7 levels, and each level adds a 1% chance for the player to get a mob's spawn egg when the player kills a mob. This mod is compatible with all mods I have tested so far, and if you find a mod that is not compatible, please comment or message me. Have Fun!!
